---
title: "ragnarok_muninn.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/harness/ragnarok_muninn.js"
loc: 72
complexity: 5
logic_score: 7.80
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 4.18
overall_score: 3.10
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [spawnSync](file://child_process)
- [*](file://fs)
- [*](file://path)
- [fileURLToPath](file://url)

### Exports
- `__filename`
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `SANDBOX_DIR`
- `UGLY_FILE`
- `escapedProjectRoot`
- `escapedSandboxDir`
- `pyScript`
- `runnerPath`
- `result`
- `healedContent`
- `arbitraryPixels`
